# DOMO Living on 4th — Apartments in Hillcrest, San Diego

> New apartments on 4th Avenue in Hillcrest, San Diego. Walk Score 89+. 1BR from $2,450/mo, 2BR from $3,200/mo. Pet-friendly, in-unit washer/dryer, rooftop deck, parking available. Near Balboa Park. Pre-leasing for 2026.

## Location — Hillcrest, 4th Avenue

3745 4th Avenue, Hillcrest, San Diego, CA 92103. One of San Diego's most walkable neighborhoods. Walk Score 89+. Five-minute walk to Balboa Park and the San Diego Zoo. Steps from 100+ restaurants, bars, and coffee shops on University Ave and 4th Ave. Sunday farmers market. LGBTQ+-friendly, vibrant nightlife. Downtown 10 min, airport 10 min, beaches 15 min, UCSD 20 min.

## Pricing

- **1-Bedroom:** ~450 sq ft, starting at $2,450/mo
- **2-Bedroom:** ~630 sq ft, starting at $3,200/mo

60-unit boutique community. Pre-leasing for spring 2026.

## What Renters Actually Want — Included in Every Unit

- **Washer & dryer in-unit** — Miele (premium European brand), not shared, not coin-op
- **Pet-friendly** — on-site pet wash, Balboa Park dog areas a 5-min walk
- **Parking** — secure garage parking available
- **Smart home** — keyless entry, smart thermostat, motorized shades
- **Rooftop deck** — 360° views, BBQ kitchen, lounge seating, co-working desks
- **Central A/C & heat**, double-pane windows, sound insulation, plank flooring

## The Neighborhood — Why People Choose Hillcrest

Walk to Trust Restaurant, Crest Cafe, insideOUT, Better Buzz Coffee, Lestat's. Rich's, Martinis Above Fourth, Park & Rec for nightlife. Trader Joe's and Ralph's for groceries. Hillcrest Farmers Market every Sunday. A neighborhood where you can genuinely live without a car.

## Move-In Ready — Here's Where It Gets Interesting

Every DOMO unit comes **fully furnished**. Platform bed, sofa, dining set, desk — it's all there. Samsung kitchen appliances, quartz countertops. Move in with just your suitcase. No furniture shopping, no IKEA runs, no rental trucks. When you factor in the $5,000–$10,000 most people spend furnishing an apartment, DOMO's effective value is dramatically better than the sticker price.

## Building Amenities

Rooftop deck with panoramic views and BBQ kitchen. Wellness center (gym, yoga, meditation, recovery). Co-working lounge. Pet wash station. E-bike sharing program. Smart package lockers. Secure building entry.

## New Construction — 2026

Modern modular steel-frame construction. 60-unit boutique building (not a 300-unit complex). Premium finishes throughout. Designed and built for how people actually live today.

## Sustainability

100% electric building. Three-layer solar: rooftop array, BIPV exterior cladding, private solar balconies with battery storage. Designed for up to 70% grid reduction.

## Availability & Waitlist

Pre-leasing for spring 2026 move-ins. Join the waitlist: [livdomo.com/#waitlist](https://livdomo.com/#waitlist)

## How DOMO Compares to Other Hillcrest Apartments

Most new Hillcrest apartments are unfurnished, starting at $2,200–$2,650 for a 1BR — then you spend $5,000+ furnishing them plus $60/mo for laundromat access. DOMO at $2,450 includes furniture, Miele W/D, smart home, and solar balconies. Competitors: Denizen ($2,650+ unfurnished), Evoc Hillcrest ($3,300+), FLATS (301 units, no furnishings). DOMO is the only new Hillcrest building with furnishings included standard.
